Fiscal year: Fiscal period during which the project was active.
Organisation class: Classification of the organization involved in the project.
Sector name: Sector to which the project belongs.
Climate change adaptation (marker): Indicator showing if the project involves climate change adaptation.
Organisation ID: Unique identifier for the organization involved; data not available in samples.
Organisation name: Name of the organization involved; data not available in samples.
Desertification (marker): Indicator showing if the project involves desertification efforts.
Bilateral aid (international marker): Indicator for bilateral aid (1 for yes, 0 for no).
Division name: Name of the division responsible for the project.
Amount spent: Total amount of money spent on the project.
Sector percent: Percentage of the project's budget allocated to a specific sector.
Section name: Name of the section associated with the project.
Project Browser country ID: Country identifier used in the project browser.
ICT as a tool for development (marker): Indicator for ICT usage in development (1 for yes, 0 for no).
Continent name: Name of the continent where the project is located.
CountryRegion name: Name of the country or region where the project is located.
Section ID: Unique identifier for the section associated with the project.
Indigenous issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects addressing indigenous issues.
Youth issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects addressing youth issues.
CIDA business delivery model (old): Old CIDA business delivery model type.
Children issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects addressing children issues.
Disability issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects addressing disability issues.
Organisation type: Type of organization involved in the project.
Biodiversity (marker): Binary indicator for projects addressing biodiversity issues.
CountryRegion percent: Percentage of project focus on a specific country or region.
Untied amount(Project-level budget): Total budget amount for the project.
CFLI (marker): Indicator for CFLI funding, always zero in samples.
Regional program (marker): Indicator for regional program involvement, always zero in samples.
FSTC percent: Percentage value related to FSTC, consistent at 1.0 in samples.
Participatory development and good gover: Indicator for participatory development, always zero in samples.
Maximum CIDA contribution (project-level: Maximum contribution by CIDA to the project.
Branch name: Name of the branch handling the project.
Division ID: ID of the division responsible for the project.
Fund centre ID: ID of the fund centre associated with the project.
Fund centre name: Name of the fund centre associated with the project.
IRTC percent: Percentage related to IRTC, likely indicating a proportion or rate.
PBA type: Indicates whether the project involves PBA (Preservation Building Assessment), with 'Not PBA' meaning it does not.
Enviromental sustainability (marker): Marker for environmental sustainability, with '0' possibly indicating no sustainability measures.
